channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: North Carolina woman held on $10M bond in alleged plot to attack Houston synagogue
item.description: Woman charged in conspiracy to target Texas synagogue members.

item.title: USF police seek help after 2 doctoral students from Bangladesh vanish in Tampa
item.description: University of South Florida authorities request public assistance locating missing students.

item.title: Federal authorities arrest 2 dozen Mexican Mafia members in California
item.description: Crackdown across Southern California targets associates of the Mexican Mafia.

item.title: NTSB recommends alcohol detection systems on all new school buses
item.description: Safety board calls for devices to prevent drunken driving of school buses.

item.title: Michigan off the hook in lawsuit over 2020 dam collapse that flooded communities
item.description: Regulators cleared of liability for failure that destroyed over 100 homes.
